A METAL SHED WAS BLOWN INTO POWER LINES, SNAPPING A POWER POLE AND KNOCKING OUT ELECTRICITY TO 2000 CUSTOMERS IN BULLHEAD CITY. RAIN SHOWERS AND A GUST FRONT WERE INDICATED BY RADAR AT THE TIME THE DAMAGE WAS REPORTED.
